title: Is This The FASTEST AI Model In The World?!! (Xiaomi MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed)
summary: Xiaomi and TileRT released a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model called MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed that achieves over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The model uses selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a persistent GPU kernel runtime to maximize inference speed.
writeup: Better Stack examines MiMo V2.5 Pro UltraSpeed, a 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model from Xiaomi and TileRT that reaches over 1,000 tokens per second on standard hardware. The focus is the inference stack: selective FP4 quantization, DFlash speculative decoding, and a persistent GPU kernel runtime, three techniques combined to push generation speed. The takeaway is how these methods interact to raise throughput on a trillion-parameter MoE without relying on specialized hardware.
